personal_context.name: Carlos DaNova Villanueva
personal_context.north_star: El Pabellón de Victoria — Hormigueros, PR

housing.notes: Annual recertification required. Keep all income documentation current. Contact authority at least 60 days before deadline.

food_assistance.notes: Recertification period varies. Check SNAP notice for exact date. Bring income verification and ID.

health.notes: Annual Open Enrollment: October 15 – December 7. Review plan each October. Keep Medicare card accessible.

transport.notes: Puerto Rico marbete (registration) and insurance both require annual renewal. CESCO renewal — bring: inspection certificate, insurance proof, ID.

life_circumstances.financial_context: Post-bankruptcy — building from ground up. Every dollar is intentional. No margin for surprises.
life_circumstances.emergency_fund_status: LOW MARGIN — flag any unexpected expense immediately
life_circumstances.emergency_protocol: Any unplanned expense over $50: send Telegram alert, triage before spending.
